mapper.select: SELECT homepage_id, popup_idx, popup_name, html, html_use_yn, popup_type, link_url, link_type, use_yn, print_seq, width, height, x_position, y_position, img_file_name, real_file_name, file_extension, file_size, add_date, link_target, start_date, end_date, common_yn, not_common FROM CMS_POPUP WHERE (homepage_id = #{homepage_id} OR (homepage_id = 'h1' AND common_yn = 'Y')) AND use_yn = 'Y' AND popup_type = 'LAYER' AND start_date <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AND end_date >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AND (INSTR(not_common, #{homepage_id}) = 0 OR not_common IS NULL) ORDER BY print_seq ASC, add_date DESC

SELECT homepage_id, popup_idx, popup_name, html, html_use_yn, popup_type, link_url, link_target, use_yn, print_seq, width, height, x_position, y_position, img_file_name, real_file_name, file_extension, file_size, start_date, end_date, add_date, common_yn, link_type, not_common FROM CMS_POPUP WHERE (homepage_id = #{homepage_id} OR (homepage_id = 'h1' AND common_yn = 'Y')) AND use_yn = 'Y' AND popup_type = 'FULL_LAYER' AND start_date <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AND end_date >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AND (INSTR(not_common, #{homepage_id}) = 0 OR not_common IS NULL) ORDER BY print_seq ASC, add_date DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_POPUP WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
AND ${search_type} LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'

SELECT homepage_id, popup_idx, popup_name, html, html_use_yn, popup_type, link_url, link_type, use_yn, print_seq, width, height, x_position, y_position, img_file_name, real_file_name, file_extension, file_size, add_date, link_target, start_date, end_date, common_yn, not_common FROM CMS_POPUP WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND popup_idx = #{popup_idx}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM CMS_POPUP WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND popup_idx = #{popup_idx}
